issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Trigger Alertmanager incident via Events API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment posts to events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue with routing_key, dedup_key, severity, source, and custom_details including runbook link; baseline used a generic curl missing dedup_key and proper payload structure.

scenarios.name: Create service with business-hours urgency and intelligent grouping
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses POST /services with alert_grouping_parameters type=intelligent, incident_urgency_rule type=use_support_hours, and support_hours configuration; baseline omitted the urgency rule structure and grouping.
